hooks.command: PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${ANTIGRAVITY_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${GEMINI_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/judge-hook.sh" ]; then printf '{"decision":"allow"}\n'; exit 0; fi; sh "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/judge-hook.sh"

PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${ANTIGRAVITY_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${GEMINI_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/writing-guard.sh" ]; then printf '{"decision":"allow"}\n'; exit 0; fi; sh "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/writing-guard.sh"

PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${ANTIGRAVITY_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${GEMINI_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}"; if [ -z "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] || [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/research-nudge.sh" ]; then printf '{"decision":"allow"}\n'; exit 0; fi; sh "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/research-nudge.sh"
